name: Content Forge
purpose: Render local media packages from approved assets, captions and briefs.

inputs.name: brief
inputs.description: Creative request, platform target and required media.

inputs.name: assets
inputs.description: Approved local images, video, audio and captions.

outputs.name: final_media
outputs.description: Rendered video, carousel images, captions, manifest and QA report.

outputs.name: publish_queue
outputs.description: Publication package queued for human approval.

risk.notes: Rendering is local. Publishing remains queued until approval.

cost.budget_hint: Use local FFmpeg and local assets first.

recovery.on_hold: wait for missing assets or brief clarification
recovery.on_failure: keep job folder, manifest, logs and failed command for repair
